pages.caption: One dark night, a little star looked down and saw the village below had no light.
"I'll shine bright for everyone!" said the little star, swooping down from the sky.
The whole village glowed warm and golden, and everyone slept safe and happy. The End.
Once upon a time, baba was a young boy in his village.
One day, his cousin Osama came to visit all the way from the city!
Baba wanted to impress Osama, so he took Osama and Owais mamu to the river.
First, baba showed them the big green farms.
Then he showed them how to cross the river, stepping stone by stone.
He showed them the open grounds, the tall trees, and the little fish in the water.
Then baba found the perfect spot. "Look at me!" he said, and got ready to jump.
But the ground wasn't solid — it was a gutter! First his feet, then his shins sank in, then his knees, thighs, hips, stomach, chest, arms, and head everything went in.
Everyone pulled and pulled until baba popped out — covered in mud from head to toe!
Baba went back to nani's house like that. Mom looked at him and shouted, "What did you do, Ahmed?"
Osama drew a funny sketch showing exactly how baba had jumped in. Everyone laughed!
But baba learned something important that day: always think before you act. The End.
